name: tpl-gov-procurement
description: Government Procurement Officer (政府採購專員) — fetch bid documents, AI compliance pre-screen, re-tender alert if zero pass, AI score compliant bids, submit scoring matrix, notify evaluation summary. Replace bid-portal externalUrl with your e-procurement system endpoint (e.g. GeBIZ, UNSPSC, SAP Ariba).

steps.notifyMsg: Re-tender required for {{tender_title}} ({{tender_id}}). Zero compliant bids received out of {{steps.compliance-prescreen.output.total_bids_received}} submitted. All bids failed compliance pre-screen. Non-compliant bidders: {{steps.compliance-prescreen.output.non_compliant_bidders}}. Procurement committee notification issued — re-tender process must be initiated per regulations.

Tender evaluation complete for {{tender_title}} ({{tender_id}}). Total bids: {{steps.compliance-prescreen.output.total_bids_received}}, Compliant: {{steps.compliance-prescreen.output.compliant_count}}. Recommended awardee: {{steps.score-compliant-bids.output.recommended_awardee_name}} ({{steps.score-compliant-bids.output.recommended_awardee_id}}). Tied: {{steps.score-compliant-bids.output.tied}}. Narrative: {{steps.score-compliant-bids.output.evaluation_narrative}}. Scoring matrix submitted to portal — reference: {{steps.submit-scoring-matrix.output.submission_reference}}. Awaiting procurement committee approval.
